_comment: Source of truth for the M7-TOOLCHAIN acceptance suite scaffolding (issue #423). Each entry pairs an acceptance marker from plans/2026-05-28-in-os-toolchain-self-hosting.md with the gating execute issue whose landing flips its SKIP to PASS. Consumed by build/scripts/validate_bundle.sh to emit the m7_toolchain section of the bundle JSON report.

markers.name: toolchain_compiles_hello_in_os
markers.description: cc driver app produces a SOF-wrapped ELF on-target.

markers.name: toolchain_runs_compiled_binary
markers.description: End-to-end run of cc output: os_process_spawn (#422) merged via PR #427; remaining gates are the cc driver (#409) producing a binary on-target and the launcher unsigned-run wiring (#410) that actually executes it.

markers.name: toolchain_unsigned_prompt_enforced
markers.description: Unsigned-run wiring through the launcher auth flow (Tier 1 trust, AUTH_TYPE_UNSIGNED_BIN).

markers.name: toolchain_large_output_persisted
markers.description: cc emits a >1 KB binary; FS path (M7-TOOLCHAIN-002, closed #405) stays byte-identical.

markers.name: toolchain_compile_error_reported
markers.description: cc exits non-zero on syntax error, prints a diagnostic, and writes no output file.

markers.name: toolchain_heap_isolation
markers.description: Kernel os_mem_brk syscall + per-process arena reset on teardown.
